name: Adze Holder with Haft Notch, XCB-105-3699
description:
Adze Holder with Haft Notch, Sea Mammal Bone, XCB-105-3699. 400 BCE-100 CE. This is one half of holder for the adze bit. Notch for wood handle.

XCB-105 Adamagan (Aleut for place of walrus hunters) is at the head of Morzhovoi Bay, western Alaska Peninsula. It is a massive village with multiple occupations. When it was occupied 400 BCE-100 CE, it was the largest village in the Arctic with an estimated 1000 people. It also has limited occupations dated 2200-1700 BCE, 1000-600 BCE, and 900-1100 CE.
faiss_text:
Adze Holder with Haft Notch, XCB-105-3699 | Adze Holder with Haft Notch, Sea Mammal Bone, XCB-105-3699. 400 BCE-100 CE. This is one half of holder for the adze bit. Notch for wood handle.

name: SPAD S.A 1915
description:
The drive of war causes man to seek out advancements in order to better the opposing force; at the time of World War I there was such a battle for aerospace amelioration.

The SPAD S.A was aeroplane that was first produced and flown in 1915. It has a maximum speed of 96 mph but could only fly around 186 miles from its origin. Compared to the Farman MF. 11 Shorthorn it had a higher maximum speed, however this what at the sacrifice of distance.

name: Ubbergens aardewerk misbrand / Ubbergen misfired
description:
Rond 700 (na Chr) moet er in Ubbergen een pottenbakkersoven gesitueerd zijn, getuige deze en vele andere misbrandfragmenten. Dit stuk is archeologisch compleet.

Around 700 (AD) a pottery kiln must have been located in Ubbergen, as witnessed by this and many other misfire fragments. This piece is archaeologically complete.

https://www.awnregionijmegen.nl/thuiswerkproject-ubbergen/

name: Ancient Bead from Necklace, Sarajevo Museum
description:
Ancient Bead from Necklace, Sarajevo Museum

Data were collected as part of a joint research project between GDH and the Association for the Digitization and Informatisation of Cultural Heritage (DIGI.BA) in Sarajevo, in full collaboration with The Sarajevo Museum. Scanned artifacts were on display. Model was created from 441 images from a Canon 5D mk IV. All data were processed in Reality Capture. Project ID NecklaceAccount2.

description:
Photogrammétrie d'une reproduction à l'échelle 1:1 (hauteur totale : environ 3 m) d'un mégacéros réalisée en résine polymère par la société Ophys basée à Prayssas (47) pour l'ArchéoParc de la Dame à Brassempouy (40) en 2014. 
Le mégacéros est un cerf géant (taille au garrot pour les mâles : 2 m / envergure des bois : jusqu'à 3,50 m) ayant vécu en Europe et Asie centrale durant la dernière glaciation. 
Un fragment de bois de mégacéros découvert sur le site archéologique des Grottes du Pape à Bras
faiss_text:

Le mégacéros est un cerf géant (taille au garrot pour les mâles : 2 m / envergure des bois : jusqu'à 3,50 m) ayant vécu en Europe et Asie centrale durant la dernière glaciation.

The model also uses a custom UVW Map for the textures, allowing you to change the colors, i.e. add a higher-quality, better-constructed texture to the model, or change the sword entirely! This model is the same model being used in my Skycraft mod for Skyrim!

author: Varatin

name: Apple Watch Stand v5
description:
This is an improved version of my last model. 

1) I've added 6 holes to bottom for inserting M8 bolts for added weight. The magnet that attaches the Watch to the charging disk is so strong that the whole thing might come along when removing the watch. Extra weight helps with this.

2) I've changed the hole behind the loading disk to have threads and I've added a screw that fit those threads. The idea here is to pin the charging disk into place but still be able to remove it later if neccessary.
faiss_text:
Apple Watch Stand v5 | This is an improved version of my last model. 

1) I've added 6 holes to bottom for inserting M8 bolts for added weight. The magnet that attaches the Watch to the charging disk is so strong that the whole thing might come along when removing the watch. Extra weight helps with this.

2) I've changed the hole behind the loading disk to have threads and I've added a screw that fit those threads. The idea here is to pin the charging disk into place but still be able to remove it later if neccessary. | stand apple apple-watch watch apple-charger watch-charger | electronics-gadgets fashion-style | general

description: Комплект кемпинговых фонарей «FLEXIC» состоит из стационарного, налобного и ручного фонарей предназначен для путешествий и оптимизирован для использования в экстренных ситуациях. Компактный и лёгкий в транспортировке, самозарядный и аккумуляторный с несколькими режимами свечения. Эргономический и привлекательный дизайн в каждом из фонарей достигается за счёт ярких цветов.  Каждый из этих фонарей имеет несколько режимов работы (круговое или локальное свечение) и несколько режимов яркости. Так же,

name: Textiles: Zhadov, "A Profitable Position"
description:
The 3D model presents a digital reconstruction of historical textile materials for a theatrical costume for Vasily Zhadov in the play "A Profitable Position" (1856) by A.N. Ostrovsky. The authors used 2D scanning to capture the look of the surfaces, post processed the images in PixPlant, generated texture maps in Photoshop and put those on the 3D models in SubstancePainter.

The authors of the 3D model are Aleksei Moskvin and Mariia Moskvina (Saint Petersburg State University of Industrial Techn

name: Farm truck stylized
description:
This is the low-poly model of farm truck made in "stylized PBR". It's rigged with the blender addon "rigacar" and I added some bones that manage by platform, doors and tank. So you can animate this in blender.
It contains:
   1. BLEND, FBX formats of model
   2. Textures - base color, normal, metallic, roughness, AO and opacity maps from 512x512 to 4096x4096 (in the render used 4096 set)

name: Juvenille mammoth ulna
description:
# SHCMS:G.10695****

**Mammuthus primigenius.**

Age: approx 14000 years.

Length 34cm Width 15cm Depth 12cm.

This is the right ulna of one of the juvenille Shropshire mammoths. Imaged using a canon 5DS R and Stackshot 3x with turntable to provide 112 images which were then processed using agisoft photoscan at high levels.

If you like this model or any others we produce we’d love to hear from you and how you’ve used them.

name: Longsword's Shield Low Poly- Very Hi Resolution
description:
A stylized, metallic kite shield made of brass, copper, and a fantasy style green steel. Uses 8k textures to show fine detail.

Companion piece to my Low Poly [Longsword](https://skfb.ly/ooLZB). Key asset in larger [wagon](https://skfb.ly/ooM6B) diorama that's dedicated to my late father. Style inspired by Valheim. Modeled in Maya, enhanced with Zbrush, and textured with Substance Painter. See full scene and more at [mattesham.com](http://www.mattesham.com)

name: Ludwig Tieck
description:
**Portrait of the poet Ludwig Tieck (1773-1853)**

Collection: Part of the sculpture collection at the city museum of Berlin, Germany. The collection consists of 3.000 objects of which a third are portrait busts of famous Berlin artists, scholars, politicians and rulers.

Model: The model is based only on 48 photographs taken from one angle in order to test the platform and RealityCapture. This results in some irregularities at the top of the head.

See the object in our database: https://sammlu

name: Temple of Eshmun
description:
Photogrammetry reconstruction using de aerial dataset from Cyark Open Heritage Project: https://artsandculture.google.com/project/cyark

The Temple of Eshmun (Arabic: معبد أشمون‎) is an ancient place of worship dedicated to Eshmun, the Phoenician god of healing. It is located near the Awali river, 2 kilometres (1.2 mi) northeast of Sidon in southwestern Lebanon. The site was occupied from the 7th century BC to the 8th century AD, suggesting an integrated relationship with the nearby city of Sido

name: Early Christian Basilica of Sofiana
description:
This 3D model is of the ruins of the Early Christian Basilica of Sofiana located near Piazza Armerina, Sicily. The ruins date to as early as the 4th Century AD. Multiple tombs are present around the structure, particularly adjacent to the apse. The model was made in Reality Capture using 250 drone images.

The data for this project were originally collected as a joint effort between the University of Catania and CVAST at the University of South Florida (USF), with the collaboration of the Fondaz

name: Adoración de los Magos - Sta. María de Brihuega
description:
Capiteles de la portada principal de la iglesia protogótica (s. XIII) de Santa María de la Peña de Brihuega (Guadalajara, España). Se encuentran sobre las arquivoltas de la izquierda de la portada y son los únicos capiteles originales que (aún en mal estado) se conservan en la portada.

Representan el momento de la Adoración de los Magos: la Virgen María con el niño reposando sentado en su regazo (a la izquierda) recibe a los tres Magos (en el centro) seguidos por un paje que lleva dos caballos

name: Ju88
description: The Junkers Ju 88 was a German World War II Luftwaffe twin-engined multirole combat aircraft. Junkers Flugzeug- und Motorenwerke (JFM) designed the plane in the mid-1930s as a so-called Schnellbomber ("fast bomber") that would be too fast for fighters of its era to intercept. It suffered from a number of technical problems during later stages of its development and early operational roles, but became one of the most versatile combat aircraft of the war. name: Bristow Fire Engine
description:
An old wooden fire engine now located in the vestibule of St Magnus the Martyr Church, Lower Thames Street, London.

From the nearby sign:
"FIRE ENGINE, late 17th/early 18th century. The only fire engines available during the Great Fire were manually operated hydraulic pumps, which were difficult to manoevre round the narrow streets. The real development in fire engine design came during the 1670s when Dutchman Jan van Heiden devised a special hose and suction pipe, and his fellow countryman Joh

name: An azumaya with EveryPoint
description:
An azumaya, Japanese small cottage in a forest park.
This point cloud model was created by EveryPoint App which is iPad Pro/iPhone LiDAR App.  The"Video + LiDAR Fusion" mode was  adopted. The quality of this point cloud is very high as photogrammetry, I think.  The 3D mesh model which was created from Metashape is uploaded in other post.  Check their quarity.

* Pole:LUMICA Bi Rod 6G-4500
* Software: EveryPoint App.
* Software:Metashape Standard
* Hardware: iPad Pro 2020, 11 inch

name: รถไถเคลียรระเบิด ไทยประดิษฐ์
description:
งานออกแบบ

ดัดแปลรถไถดินของ คูโบต้าที่มีในท้องตลาด ให้เป็นรถเคลียพื้นที่ระเบิด
เพิ่มเกราะป้องกัน คนขับแบบหัวรถถัง มีกล้อง CCTV ช่วยในการควบคุมและป้องกันการบังคับในห้องควบคุม ด้านหลังต่อเครื่องยนต์เพื่อใช้ใบพัดเกี่ยวข้าวเพื่อเคลียรฺระเบิด อีกครั้ง เน้นความปลอดภัยในห้องควบคุม ภายในบันทึกข้อมูลพิกัด GPS เพื่อ
บันทึกพิกัดที่เคลียพื้นที่

name: Palacio de Justicia de la Nación (Argentina)
description:
Proyectado por el arquitecto francés Norbert Maillart en 1889  y comenzanda la construcción en 1905. Una parte del Palacio fue inaugurada en 1910 en el marco del Centenario de la Revolución de Mayo. Sin embargo, faltaba aún mucho por construir, y la Corte Suprema se instaló en el nuevo edificio recién en 1912. En 1914, en el marco del estallido de la Primera Guerra Mundial y por problemas administrativos y presupuestarios, la obra queda suspendida, para retomarse recién en la década de 1920.
Se
faiss_text:
Palacio de Justicia de la Nación (Argentina) | Proyectado por el arquitecto francés Norbert Maillart en 1889  y comenzanda la construcción en 1905. Una parte del Palacio fue inaugurada en 1910 en el marco del Centenario de la Revolución de Mayo. Sin embargo, faltaba aún mucho por construir, y la Corte Suprema se instaló en el nuevo edificio recién en 1912. En 1914, en el marco del estallido de la Primera Guerra Mundial y por problemas administrativos y presupuestarios, la obra queda suspendida, para retomarse recién en la década de 1920.

The hole in the middle is a glass store front.

name: Ship4
description:
The idea behind this ship is having a carier ship. It is not made for any form of combat and just to transport people and items. This means it would be a large ship and the reason behind the big engines on the back of the ship. To make this ship i mainy extruded a cube and adjusted the thickness of it depending on what part i worked on. To make the exhausts on the back I selected a cylinder and reduced the sub devisions.

Here is my concecpt idea for this ship.

description:
Roads&Walls from my game "**Lords of power**". Low-poly, color palettes, no animation.
Prototype your city faster with this modular lightweight Roads&Walls Kit. Win time by focusing on what is more important instead of create all this assets from zero.

It includes a folder with 28 parts.

For tile 40mx20mx40m

The model is compatible with [Roads Arch - Modular pack](https://skfb.ly/6Tqor) and [Roads&Bridges - Tileset pack](https://skfb.ly/6T8oD)

name: The Strike By Greg James 1991
description:
THE STRIKE BY GREG JAMES 1991.
This sculpture depicts the gold strike near Coolgardie by prospectors William Ford and Authur Bayley in 1892 which unleashed the gold rushes that secured the future of the struggling colony of Western Australia. Established one of the states most successful and enduring industries and led to the foundation of the Perth Mint in 1899.

This stone marks the location of a time capsule laid by the Premier of Western Australia. The honourable R.F Court MLA. On the occati

The Strike By Greg James 1991 | THE STRIKE BY GREG JAMES 1991.

name: Wisdom - "Moudrost"
description:
Scanned sculpture by Matyáš Bernard Braun from the series Virtues and vices. Sculpture represents virtue - Wisdom. Model is decimated to 30k triangles from original scan and tweaked by hand.

You can download the model for free, even for commercial purposes - you just have to include the attribution below: 3d model by Vojtěch Žák Leischner www.trackmeifyoucan.com If you use it for your work please let me know and send me the link to the work! I will promote it. Thanks!

name: RK18 T00217 Timber
description:
RK18 T00217 is a timber found during the archaeological excavation of the Rooswijk in 2017. The concretion was excavated by conservators and archaelogists in the conservation facility.

In 2017 and 2018, the shipwreck of the Rooswijk, a 300 year old Dutch East India Company (VOC) ship which sank on the treacherous Goodwin Sands in January 1740 off the coast of England, was excavated by an international team of maritime archaeologists. Post-excavation work began straight after each excavation cam

name: Ancient Theatre, Sagalassos, Turkey
description: The theatre at Sagalassos, Turkey, was built between 120 and 190 CE, possibly preceded by an earlier construction in the Hellenistic tradition. Its construction was stopped by the end of the second century CE, with parts of the seating unfinished and a stage area of only one story. It could seat thousands of spectators. In this model one can also visualize the corridor behind the theatre seating. This model was constructed from 4520 photos (Phantom 4 Pro [20mpx], Sony A7iii [24mpx], A7riii [45mp

name: Reichstag preview
description:
Reichstag preview

The Reichstag of the German Empire and the Reichstag of the Weimar Republic (Reichstag of the German Empire) was a historic building in Berlin, where the German state body of the same name met in 1894-1933. In 1945, in the Soviet Union, the building of the German Parliament was declared the main symbol of Hitler's Germany. I. V. Stalin ordered to plant the Victory Banner on it

name: Vacuum cleaner with three industrial motors
description:
Vacuum cleaner with three industrial motors, Panda model

This model has 3 electric motors, three long-core water and dust impellers with 3 separate on / off switches for each electric motor, which is intended for manual control as well as resting the electric motors in long-term use.

This model is designed with the ability to absorb wet and dry waste and has a tank with a volume of 80 liters made of steel.

Equipped with float switch for times when the tank of the device is filled with suction

name: PAZ-3205 Cabin
description:
Photogrammetry of the PAZ-3205 Cabin.

PAZ-3205 is a common Soviet midibus model made by the Pavlovo Bus Factory. It is common in Russia and other Eastern European countries as both a low-intensity route public bus and as a hearse. Model 3205 was launched on December 1, 1989, replacing a similarly specified PAZ-672 (a 1968 model).

author: DGadenov

name: unreliableobject_41
description:
Found in the Western Cape Region, South Africa.

No choice but stand. Somehow up and stand. Somehow stand. That or groan. The groan so long on itsway. No. No groan. Simply pain. Simply up. A time when try how. Try see. Try say. How first it lay. Then somehow knelt. Bit by bit. Then on from there. Bit by bit. Till up at last. Not now. Fail better worse now.

Samuel Beckett (1983): Worstward Ho. London.
faiss_text:
unreliableobject_41 | Found in the Western Cape Region, South Africa.

No choice but stand. Somehow up and stand. Somehow stand. That or groan. The groan so long on itsway. No. No groan. Simply pain. Simply up. A time when try how. Try see. Try say. How first it lay. name: F111
description:
The General Dynamics F-111 Aardvark was a supersonic, medium-range interdictor and tactical attack aircraft that also filled the roles of strategic nuclear bomber, aerial reconnaissance, and electronic-warfare aircraft in its various versions. Developed in the 1960s by General Dynamics, it first entered service in 1967 with the United States Air Force. The Royal Australian Air Force (RAAF) also ordered the type and began operating F-111Cs in 1973.
The F-111 pioneered several technologies for pro

name: Ford LTD Crown Victoria
description:
Low poly model of 1985 Ford LTD Crown Victoria.

This is an asset for my upcoming mobile game Double Rocks. The game setting is inspired by the “Twin Peaks” series and this model is a reference to the 1985 Ford LTD Crown Victoria sedan of the Twin Peaks police department. Tommy "Hawk" Hill used to drive one of the 2 CVs.

The model is flat shaded low poly colored with a texture. Can be easily recolored. Optimized for mobile games.

They are on both sides of the cane coming down to Harrison. Wood is white pine and stained. The carved handle is an animal head design. Three of the president’s names are misspelled: Madison, Hayes, and Arthu

It's very sharp one too.

name: Ancient Fountain, Via Talasesse, Arcidosso
description:
A beautiful fountain on Via Talassese, Arcidosso, Grosseto, Tuscany. The dating is unknown although the stylized human face is similar to other specimens in the same area dated to the Renaissance period (cc. 16-17) and located in the public fountains of Castel del Piano and in the 'Pope fountain' at  the convent of St. Trinity near Santa Fiora. [source M. Nucciotti, 2003]

Model was created in Reality Capture using 486 photographs. The Mt. Amiata Project is an ongoing GDH collaboration involving

name: Барельєф: "Кирило Розумовський"
description:
Робота скульптора Володимира Давидовича Нікітенко, 1923 – 2018р., м.Приморськ

Сканування робіт виконано ГО “Приморськ 24/7” спільно з ГО “Спілка краєзнавців Приморська” за сприяння Приморського краєзнавчого музею, в рамках виконання проєкту “Смарт-підтримка молодіжного центру Портал”. Фінансування відбувається завдяки Програмі ООН із відновлення та розбудови миру, що фінансується за підтримки Європейського Союзу та урядів Данії, Швейцарії та Швеції.
faiss_text:
Барельєф: "Кирило Розумовський" | Робота скульптора Володимира Давидовича Нікітенко, 1923 – 2018р., м.Приморськ

Сканування робіт виконано ГО “Приморськ 24/7” спільно з ГО “Спілка краєзнавців Приморська” за сприяння Приморського краєзнавчого музею, в рамках виконання проєкту “Смарт-підтримка молодіжного центру Портал”. name: Japanese Zabuton
description: One of the object for Japanese Room Set. A Zabuton is a Japanese cushion for sitting. The zabuton is generally used when sitting on the floor, and may also be used when sitting on a chair. For a more casual setting the zabuton can be used in conjunction with a zaisu, a type of Japanese legless chair, and with or without an accompanying kyousoku, a Japanese-style armrest. Ordinarily, any place in Japan where seating is on the floor will be provided with zabuton, for sitting comfort. A typical zab
